reason: Agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title ("Example Domain"), and returned the correct response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with Super Agent interface showing three agents in the sidebar.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260327-000409-6rax" agent in the sidebar - Agent page opened with message input box ready for conversation.
Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." by typing and clicking send button - Message was accepted and agent began processing.
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Agent completed all browser operations in 14 seconds and returned the response.

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly displays "The page title is Example Domain." with successful tool call indicators (green checkmarks) for: Open Browser, Page Snapshot, Browser Command (get title), and Close Browser.
